verdict.description: FAITHFUL: JSON completely and correctly represents the English. NOT_FAITHFUL: JSON contradicts, drops, or adds something. AMBIGUOUS: cannot decide because the English is underspecified.

confidence.description: Calibrated probability that this verdict is correct.

interpretable.description: True if the English policy is concrete enough to verify at all.

mismatches.description: One entry per concrete divergence. Empty when verdict is FAITHFUL.

field.description: The JSON field that diverges, e.g. max_amount, currency, categories, merchants, time_window, period.

issue.description: Short description of how it diverges from the English.
